hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); fp and open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/pm-doc-session.txt'),'a').write(fp+chr(10))" 2>/dev/null || true

TRACKING=$(python -c "import os; print(open(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/pm-doc-session.txt')).read())" 2>/dev/null || true); CHANGED=$(echo "$TRACKING" | tr '\\' '/' | sort -u); echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qi 'CLAUDE\.md' && CLAUDE_OK=1 || CLAUDE_OK=0; echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qi 'mockup_dashboard\.html' && MOCKUP_OK=1 || MOCKUP_OK=0; PY_CODE=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -iE '\.py$' | grep -ivE '(/tests/|_test\.py|__init__\.py|conftest)' || true); PAGE_HTML=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -iE '/page\.html$' || true); WARNINGS=''; [ -n "$PY_CODE" ] && [ "$CLAUDE_OK" -eq 0 ] && WARNINGS="${WARNINGS}CLAUDE.md may need updating (.py files changed). "; [ -n "$PAGE_HTML" ] && [ "$MOCKUP_OK" -eq 0 ] && WARNINGS="${WARNINGS}mockup_dashboard.html may need updating (page.html changed). "; [ -n "$WARNINGS" ] && python -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': 'Doc reminder: ' + sys.argv[1]}))" "$WARNINGS" || true
